What you can get

Build · Rent · Own.

Three ways to get verified AI delivery — every job checked, every result logged. Fixed outcomes, not hourly surprise.

Start intake → Talk to a human

Try it free first · Technical overview for developers

48-hour

Acquisition system

$1,500–$5,000 setup

  • Landing + intake + confirmation path
  • Proof pack on delivery
  • 48–72h to first deliverable

Canonical band — matches Offer and Start

Request a 48-hour build →
Build

Custom build + runtime

$3,000–$10,000 project

  • Tell us the job, inputs, output, and never-rules
  • Scoped, verified workflow built for your use case
  • Live in 2–3 weeks · handoff + proof replay review
  • 50% deposit · balance on verified delivery

Illustrative build band — scope confirmed on discovery

Start intake →
Rent

Run jobs on SourceA

From $2,000/mo

  • Seat-based access to the platform
  • Base subscription + per-run · every result logged
  • Safety checks before every AI action
  • Weekly status reports · export anytime

Illustrative platform band — procurement pack available

Start a seat →
Own

License a configured machine

Custom

  • Run in your own stack
  • Same checks and records · your infrastructure
  • Enterprise procurement · security pack included
  • Scoped license · support band negotiable
Need enterprise scope review →

Also available: Ops Health Audit $750 · Agency retainer from $2K/mo — start intake

What ships with every build

  • Delivery record — what ran, what was checked, with timestamps
  • Proof replay review — replay script your team can re-run in the browser
  • Weekly reports — HTML/PDF summaries for procurement or client sign-off
  • Handoff doc — scope, deposit terms, 30-day fix window, approval gates

* Illustrative timeline and pricing bands — final scope is finalized after proof intake review.

What every plan includes

Safety checks before every run, verified records, and a demo you can walk through in under five minutes — show the work, not a slide deck.

Developers can review our technical overview or open-source eval tool. Platform procurement: download pack · security overview.

Typical timeline

2–3 weeks to first live loop
Fixed scope — no hourly drift
